(M0610) Cog/Behavr/Psych Symp- Verbal Disruption This field indicates verbal disruption has been demonstrated at least once a week. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x
M1745_BEH_PROB_FRQ M1745 (M0620) Frequency of Disruptive Behavior Symptoms This field indicates the frequency of disruptive behavior symptoms. 00 = Never
01 = Less than once a month
02 = Once a month
03 = Several times each month
04 = Several times a week
05 = At least daily CHAR 2 x x x x x
